page_content:
Repeatable to: 4 credits.

MUSC129 Ensemble (1 Credit)

Rehearsal and performance of selected works for small ensembles of instruments, piano, or small vocal groups. After two registrations in MUSC129, the student will elect MUSC229 for two additional semesters and MUSC329 thereafter.

MUSC130 What Does Music Mean? (3 Credits)

An examination of how music creates meaning in different eras, through studying musical sound, biography, and social history.

Restriction: Must not be in any of the following programs (Music (Professional Program); Music Education).
